description: A designed slogan/propaganda poster in portrait format built over a real photograph of a busy commercial restaurant kitchen. The photo shows a woman in a gray cap, white T-shirt and plastic apron working at a stainless-steel range, holding a frying pan with food; a second worker in a cap and apron stands at right with stacked dishes, amid steel pots, burner knobs and steam. Overlaid on the upper-left in a bold, distressed/grunge stencil typeface is the slogan 'IT'S TIME TO' (white) 'GET RIGHT' (yellow) 'WITH THE' (white) 'LAW' (very large yellow). The gritty, weathered lettering gives it an aggressive, warning tone. Bottom-left in white reads the URL 'ICE.gov/IMAGE'; bottom-right shows the round DHS seal and the 'ICE' wordmark. The messaging targets employers/businesses (per the tweet, about worksite enforcement and the IMAGE compliance program), using an implied-threat technique aimed at those who hire unauthorized workers, while the imagery of restaurant labor signals the industries under scrutiny. Target audience: business owners, with a coercive 'comply or face enforcement' message.
notable_text: IT'S TIME TO GET RIGHT WITH THE LAW; ICE.gov/IMAGE
